headline: $8.5M Returned to Verus Bridge After Bounty Offer

article.title: Verus bridge exploiter returns $8.5M after bounty offer
article.summary: The hacker behind the Verus bridge exploit returned 75% of the stolen funds as part of a recovery deal negotiated with the protocol days after the incident.

headline: Bitcoin Surges 90 Days Straight Amid Bull Rally

article.title: Bitcoin price record 90-day uptrend 'resembles bull market rally:' New analysis
article.summary: Bitcoin rallied for 90 days after its dip below $60,000, breaking the record for the longest uptrend within a bear market in BTC price history.

headline: China Cuts US Chemical Exports 30% Overnight

article.title: China Restricts Chemical Exports to US in Fentanyl Crackdown
article.summary: China imposed new export controls on some key chemical ingredients shipped to the US, Mexico and Canada, in a further sign of cooperation with Washington on curbing drug trafficking.

headline: US Stocks Rally Towards 4-Week Winning Streak

article.title: US Stocks Eye Best Weekly Run of Gains Since 2023: Markets Wrap
article.summary: The S&P 500 is heading for its longest streak of weekly wins since 2023 as hopes that the US and Iran are moving closer to a peace deal and unrelenting enthusiasm for artificial intelligence keep on driving equities higher.

headline: Cuban Dumps 90% of Bitcoin Holdings Overnight

article.title: Mark Cuban Sells Most of His Bitcoin, Calls It a Failed Hedge
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Mark Cuban Sells Most of His Bitcoin, Calls It a Failed Hedge
Billionaire investor Mark Cuban says he has sold most of his Bitcoin, arguing it has failed to function as a reliable hedge against fiat weakness and geopolitical risk.

Nick Begich, R-Alaska, introduced legislation today to permanently establish a U.S. strategic bitcoin reserve.

article.title: Nearly $500B in Bitcoin Is Exposed to Future Quantum Computing Attacks: Glassnode
article.summary: Blockchain data firm Glassnode mapped the vulnerabilities embedded in Bitcoin’s existing supply, pointing to exchanges as a weak point.

headline: $1B Ethereum Fund Proposed Amid Market Volatility

article.title: Prominent Ethereum Dev Proposes $1 Billion ETH Organization With Leader Who 'Wants to Fight'
article.summary: Former Ethereum Foundation researcher Dankrad Feist appeared to take pointed shots Thursday at ETH co-founder Vitalik Buterin.

headline: F2Pool Co-Founder Invests in $10B Mars Mission

article.title: ‘No longer a distant place’: F2Pool Co-founder Chun Wang joins SpaceX’s 2-year mission to Mars
article.summary: Wang will board Starship on a two-year mission that will explore outside the Earth-Moon system and conduct a fly-by of Mars.

article.title: Polymarket probes suspected private key compromise of internal top-up wallet on Polygon
article.summary: Polymarket said findings point to a possible private key compromise tied to an internal top-up wallet on Polygon.
